more.description: That's Just Nuts uses storytelling and colourful characters to introduce children to concepts such as saving, patience, long-term investing and the dangers of chasing quick riches.

more.title: Korea coach undecided about how to set up against Bafana
more.description: South Korea’s coach has admitted he remains undecided on how he wants to set up his team for their crucial 2026 FIFA World Cup clash against Bafana Bafana.

more.title: Jeffreys Bay’s surfing dreams dashed as World Surf League withdraws 2026 event
more.description: For decades, winter in Jeffreys Bay has meant more than chilly mornings and powerful swells. But in 2026, the familiar excitement is missing. Algoa FM News reports that the World Surf League (WSL) has removed Jeffreys Bay from its Championship Tour calendar, replacing the iconic South African stop with an event at New Zealand’s famed Raglan break. The decision, announced... Read more → The post Jeffreys Bay’s surfing dreams dashed as World Surf League withdraws 2026 event appeared first on Cape Town ETC .

more.title: Two entities shortlisted to bid to partner with Transnet on ‘LeaseCo’
more.description: Transnet has issued a formal request for proposals (RFP) to two shortlisted bidders that participated in an earlier request for qualification (RFQ) process relating to the creation of a railways rolling stock leasing entity, dubbed LeaseCo, as a public–private partnership. The identities of the two bidders were not immediately released, with Transnet confirming only that the shortlisted bidders had been selected from among the 14 respondents to the April RFQ.

more.title: All Blacks name Test squad – and NO Springbok fan should be worried
more.description: New All Blacks coach Dave Rennie has named Ardie Savea as captain, promising "optimistic" rugby ahead of the Nations Championship.

more.title: UK to invest $66 million in critical minerals to reduce import reliance
more.description: Britain will invest £50-million ($66-million) to boost domestic production of critical minerals, the government said on Monday, as it seeks to reduce reliance on concentrated global supply chains and strengthen economic resilience. The funding will support projects across extraction, processing and recycling, aimed at securing materials used in products ranging from smartphones and fridges to electric vehicle batteries.

more.title: Afrizan People Intelligence BPO launches Cape Town contact centre, delivering world-class CX and creating sustainable youth employment at scale
more.description: Afrizan People Intelligence BPO says it has created over 1 100 employment opportunities within its contact centre operations since inception in 2023.

more.title: Who is owner of Springbok Casino?
more.description: Springbok Casino is operated by Quadgreen N.V., a company registered in Curacao. Payment processing is handled by the related Enneagon Ltd., based in the United Kingdom. This setup allows the casino to offer a dedicated ZAR experience while maintaining international standards through its Curacao Gaming Commission license.
